trigger.Name: Create_koch
trigger.script:
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire1", -1, -1, CVector(5058.297, 396.772, 1241.478), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 0.112)
CreateVehicleEx("CoolBelaz_3","Kochewnik1", CVector(5064.187, 396.000, 1219.352), 1064) trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: DestroyCRAGS
trigger.script:
CreateEffectInsertedInRemove( "ET_PS_VEH_EXP1_MED1", CVector(1970.358, 225.000, 6103.171), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), true ) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(1970.358, 225.000, 6103.171), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(1943.013, 224.000, 6087.181), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(1948.715, 224.500, 6022.518), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(1953.260, 224.941, 6052.282), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(1972.546, 235.000, 6075.076), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000) CreateEffectTTLed("ET_PS_BRIDGE_EXP_MAIN", CVector(1956.966, 224.094, 6036.535), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 5000)
local cd1 = GetEntityByName("CUM01") if cd1 then cd1:Remove() end local cd2 = GetEntityByName("CUM02") if cd2 then cd2:Remove() end local cd3 = GetEntityByName("CUM03") if cd3 then cd3:Remove() end local cd4 = GetEntityByName("CUM04") if cd4 then cd4:Remove() end local cd5 = GetEntityByName("CUM05") if cd5 then cd5:Remove() end local cd6 = GetEntityByName("CUM06") if cd6 then cd6:Remove() end local cd7 = GetEntityByName("CUM07") if cd7 then cd7:Remove() end local cd8 = GetEntityByName("CUM08") if cd8 then cd8:Remove() end local cd9 = GetEntityByName("CUM09") if cd9 then cd9:Remove() end local cd10 = GetEntityByName("CUM10") if cd10 then cd10:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CreateDOTs
trigger.script:
CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot01", 1025, CVector(2886.672, 281.900, 1379.048), Quaternion(0.000, -0.668, 0.000, 0.745),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot02", 1025, CVector(3031.598, 286.329, 1229.467), Quaternion(0.000, 0.991, 0.000, 0.133),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun04","dot03", 1025, CVector(2955.128, 253.755, 1266.995), Quaternion(0.000, 0.993, 0.000, 0.115),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot2_rainmetal","dot04", 1025, CVector(2931.030, 252.543, 1296.663), Quaternion(0.000, 0.938, 0.000, 0.346),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun03","dot05", 1025, CVector(2867.920, 247.817, 1259.054), Quaternion(0.000, 0.781, 0.000, 0.624),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot4_octopus","dot06", 1025, CVector(2796.791, 249.890, 1176.760), Quaternion(0.000, 0.685, 0.000, 0.728),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot07", 1025, CVector(2817.649, 247.823, 1114.579), Quaternion(0.000, 0.248, 0.000, 0.969),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot08", 1025, CVector(2773.922, 247.745, 1072.008), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot2_rainmetal","dot09", 1025, CVector(2691.814, 276.917, 1190.294), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot4_octopus","dot10", 1025, CVector(2695.367, 247.713, 929.348), Quaternion(0.000, -0.668, 0.000, 0.745),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot4_octopus","dot11", 1025, CVector(2542.570, 248.320, 872.923), Quaternion(0.000, 0.991, 0.000, 0.133),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot12", 1025, CVector(2579.882, 247.667, 983.994), Quaternion(0.000, 0.993, 0.000, 0.115),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot13", 1025, CVector(2554.182, 247.713, 1044.223), Quaternion(0.000, 0.938, 0.000, 0.346),0 )
CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot14", 1025, CVector(3289.526, 199.699, 2232.719), Quaternion(0.000, 0.781, 0.000, 0.624),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot15", 1025, CVector(3325.755, 198.517, 2373.894), Quaternion(0.000, 0.685, 0.000, 0.728),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot16", 1025, CVector(3374.317, 198.691, 2357.124), Quaternion(0.000, 0.248, 0.000, 0.969),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot17", 1025, CVector(3408.765, 206.000, 2757.640), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot18", 1025, CVector(3358.065, 204.517, 2763.279), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot2_rainmetal","dot19", 1025, CVector(3431.725, 215.712, 2878.926), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "heavy_dot2_rainmetal","dot20", 1025, CVector(3386.066, 215.766, 2917.367), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989),0 )
CreateNewDummyObject( "arena_barricade10", "Zabor1", -1, -1, CVector(7069.430, 236.847, 4330.213), Quaternion(-0.0884, 0.3849, 0.0371, 0.9180), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "arena_barricade10", "Zabor2", -1, -1, CVector(7056.400, 235.437, 4316.788), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.3867, 0.0000, 0.9222), 0)
CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun02","dot011", 1063, CVector(2017.524, 248.729, 6790.798), Quaternion(0.000, -1.000, 0.000, -0.007),0 ) CreateNewBreakableObject( "staticAutoGun01","dot021", 1063, CVector(1985.481, 247.987, 6789.203), Quaternion(0.000, 1.000, 0.000, -0.026),0 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: DestroyDOTs
trigger.script:
local d1 = GetEntityByName("dot01") if d1 then d1:Remove() end local d2 = GetEntityByName("dot02") if d2 then d2:Remove() end local d3 = GetEntityByName("dot03") if d3 then d3:Remove() end local d4 = GetEntityByName("dot04") if d4 then d4:Remove() end local d5 = GetEntityByName("dot05") if d5 then d5:Remove() end local d6 = GetEntityByName("dot06") if d6 then d6:Remove() end local d7 = GetEntityByName("dot07") if d7 then d7:Remove() end local d8 = GetEntityByName("dot08") if d8 then d8:Remove() end local d9 = GetEntityByName("dot09") if d9 then d9:Remove() end local d10 = GetEntityByName("dot10") if d10 then d10:Remove() end local d11 = GetEntityByName("dot11") if d11 then d11:Remove() end local d12 = GetEntityByName("dot12") if d12 then d12:Remove() end local d13 = GetEntityByName("dot13") if d13 then d13:Remove() end local d14 = GetEntityByName("dot14") if d14 then d14:Remove() end local d15 = GetEntityByName("dot15") if d15 then d15:Remove() end local d16 = GetEntityByName("dot16") if d16 then d16:Remove() end local d17 = GetEntityByName("dot17") if d17 then d17:Remove() end local d18 = GetEntityByName("dot18") if d18 then d18:Remove() end local d19 = GetEntityByName("dot19") if d19 then d19:Remove() end local d20 = GetEntityByName("dot20") if d20 then d20:Remove() end
CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot21", -1, -1, CVector(2886.672, 281.900, 1379.048), Quaternion(0.000, 0.991, 0.000, 0.133), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot22", -1, -1, CVector(3031.598, 286.329, 1229.467), Quaternion(0.000, 0.993, 0.000, 0.115), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot23", -1, -1, CVector(2955.128, 253.755, 1266.995), Quaternion(0.000, 0.938, 0.000, 0.346), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot24", -1, -1, CVector(2931.030, 252.543, 1296.663), Quaternion(0.000, 0.781, 0.000, 0.624), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken1", "dot25", -1, -1, CVector(2867.920, 247.817, 1259.054), Quaternion(0.000, 0.685, 0.000, 0.728), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot26", -1, -1, CVector(2796.791, 249.890, 1176.760), Quaternion(0.000, 0.248, 0.000, 0.969), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot27", -1, -1, CVector(2817.649, 247.823, 1114.579), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot28", -1, -1, CVector(2773.922, 247.745, 1072.008), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot29", -1, -1, CVector(2691.814, 276.917, 1190.294), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot30", -1, -1, CVector(2695.367, 247.713, 929.348), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot31", -1, -1, CVector(2542.570, 248.320, 872.923), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot32", -1, -1, CVector(2579.882, 247.667, 983.994), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot33", -1, -1, CVector(2554.182, 247.713, 1044.223), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0)
CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot34", -1, -1, CVector(3289.526, 199.699, 2232.719), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot35", -1, -1, CVector(3325.755, 198.517, 2373.894), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot36", -1, -1, CVector(3374.317, 198.691, 2357.124), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot37", -1, -1, CVector(3408.765, 206.000, 2757.640), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot38", -1, -1, CVector(3358.065, 204.517, 2763.279), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot39", -1, -1, CVector(3431.725, 215.712, 2878.926), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot40", -1, -1, CVector(3386.066, 215.766, 2917.367), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0)
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire1", -1, -1, CVector(2636.529, 249.000, 1087.074), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.814) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire2", -1, -1, CVector(2760.103, 247.000, 1019.095), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.823) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire3", -1, -1, CVector(3017.879, 247.000, 1050.243), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 2.147) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire4", -1, -1, CVector(3445.213, 199.000, 2437.908), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 2.656) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire5", -1, -1, CVector(3250.324, 199.000, 2475.609), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 3.504) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire6", -1, -1, CVector(3308.104, 208.000, 2789.800), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 2.486)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: DestroyDOTsALTER
trigger.script:
local d1 = GetEntityByName("dot01") if d1 then d1:Remove() end local d2 = GetEntityByName("dot02") if d2 then d2:Remove() end local d3 = GetEntityByName("dot03") if d3 then d3:Remove() end local d4 = GetEntityByName("dot04") if d4 then d4:Remove() end local d5 = GetEntityByName("dot05") if d5 then d5:Remove() end local d6 = GetEntityByName("dot06") if d6 then d6:Remove() end local d7 = GetEntityByName("dot07") if d7 then d7:Remove() end local d8 = GetEntityByName("dot08") if d8 then d8:Remove() end local d9 = GetEntityByName("dot09") if d9 then d9:Remove() end local d10 = GetEntityByName("dot10") if d10 then d10:Remove() end local d11 = GetEntityByName("dot11") if d11 then d11:Remove() end local d12 = GetEntityByName("dot12") if d12 then d12:Remove() end local d13 = GetEntityByName("dot13") if d13 then d13:Remove() end
CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot21", -1, -1, CVector(2886.672, 281.900, 1379.048), Quaternion(0.000, 0.991, 0.000, 0.133), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot22", -1, -1, CVector(3031.598, 286.329, 1229.467), Quaternion(0.000, 0.993, 0.000, 0.115), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot23", -1, -1, CVector(2955.128, 253.755, 1266.995), Quaternion(0.000, 0.938, 0.000, 0.346), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot24", -1, -1, CVector(2931.030, 252.543, 1296.663), Quaternion(0.000, 0.781, 0.000, 0.624), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken1", "dot25", -1, -1, CVector(2867.920, 247.817, 1259.054), Quaternion(0.000, 0.685, 0.000, 0.728), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot26", -1, -1, CVector(2796.791, 249.890, 1176.760), Quaternion(0.000, 0.248, 0.000, 0.969), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot27", -1, -1, CVector(2817.649, 247.823, 1114.579), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot28", -1, -1, CVector(2773.922, 247.745, 1072.008), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot29", -1, -1, CVector(2691.814, 276.917, 1190.294), Quaternion(0.000, -0.139, 0.000, 0.990), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot30", -1, -1, CVector(2695.367, 247.713, 929.348), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "heavy_dot_brocken3", "dot31", -1, -1, CVector(2542.570, 248.320, 872.923), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot32", -1, -1, CVector(2579.882, 247.667, 983.994), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0) CreateNewDummyObject( "sack_dot_brocken2", "dot33", -1, -1, CVector(2554.182, 247.713, 1044.223), Quaternion(0.000, -0.146, 0.000, 0.989), 0)
CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire1", -1, -1, CVector(2636.529, 249.000, 1087.074), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.814) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire2", -1, -1, CVector(2760.103, 247.000, 1019.095), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 1.823) CreateNewSgNodeObject("ET_PS_HOUSE_MED_FIRE", "Fire3", -1, -1, CVector(3017.879, 247.000, 1050.243), Quaternion(0.0000, 0.0000, 0.0000, 1.0000), 2.147)
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: RemoveZabor
trigger.script:
local zb1 = GetEntityByName("Zabor1") if zb1 then zb1:Remove() end local zb2 = GetEntityByName("Zabor2") if zb2 then zb2:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: RemoveBuntHum
trigger.script:
local humBuntLid = GetEntityByName("Buntovshik") if humBuntLid then humBuntLid:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: RemoveBuntVehicles
trigger.script:
local veh1 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt1") if veh1 then veh1:Remove() end
local veh2 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt2") if veh2 then veh2:Remove() end
local veh3 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt3") if veh3 then veh3:Remove() end
local veh4 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt4") if veh4 then veh4:Remove() end
local veh5 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt5") if veh5 then veh5:Remove() end
local veh6 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt6") if veh6 then veh6:Remove() end
local veh7 = GetEntityByName("vehBunt7") if veh7 then veh7:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: RemoveDefendVehicles
trigger.script:
local LIDTEAM = GetEntityByName("LeaderVeh1") if LIDTEAM then LIDTEAM:Remove() end
local LIDPTEAM = GetEntityByName("LeaderVehPartz1") if LIDPTEAM then LIDPTEAM:Remove() end
local RVA1 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesAlpha1") if RVA1 then RVA1:Remove() end
local RVA2 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesAlpha2") if RVA2 then RVA2:Remove() end
local RVA3 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesAlpha3") if RVA3 then RVA3:Remove() end
local RVA4 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesAlpha4") if RVA4 then RVA4:Remove() end
local RVA5 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesAlpha5") if RVA5 then RVA5:Remove() end
local LVA1 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesAlpha1") if LVA1 then LVA1:Remove() end
local LVA2 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesAlpha2") if LVA2 then LVA2:Remove() end
local LVA3 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesAlpha3") if LVA3 then LVA3:Remove() end
local LVA4 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesAlpha4") if LVA4 then LVA4:Remove() end
local LVA5 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesAlpha5") if LVA5 then LVA5:Remove() end
local RVP1 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesPartz1") if RVP1 then RVP1:Remove() end
local RVP2 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesPartz2") if RVP2 then RVP2:Remove() end
local RVP3 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesPartz3") if RVP3 then RVP3:Remove() end
local RVP4 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesPartz4") if RVP4 then RVP4:Remove() end
local RVP5 = GetEntityByName("RightVehiclesPartz5") if RVP5 then RVP5:Remove() end
local LVP1 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesPartz1") if LVP1 then LVP1:Remove() end
local LVP2 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesPartz2") if LVP2 then LVP2:Remove() end
local LVP3 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesPartz3") if LVP3 then LVP3:Remove() end
local LVP4 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesPartz4") if LVP4 then LVP4:Remove() end
local LVP5 = GetEntityByName("LeftVehiclesPartz5") if LVP5 then LVP5:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap15
trigger.script:
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
local b = SpawnMessageBox( "8805" ) if b == 1 then PassToMap("r1m5", "FromR1M1", -1 ) trigger:Deactivate() else SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 1, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate ("RolikENDExitToMap15") end

trigger.Name: RolikENDExitToMap15
trigger.script:
GameFiltersUse()
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
GetPlayerVehicle():SetGamePositionOnGround(CVector(getPos("InBase_loc")))
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap41
trigger.script:
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
local b = SpawnMessageBox( "8801" ) if b == 1 then CompleteQuest("Na_vostok_quest") PassToMap("r4m1", "FromR1M1", -1 )
trigger:Deactivate() else SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 1, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate ("RolikENDExitToMap41") end

trigger.Name: RolikENDExitToMap41
trigger.script:
GameFiltersUse()
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: triggerExitToMap411
trigger.script:
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() Plf:SetThrottle( 0 ) Plf:SetCustomLinearVelocity( 0 )
local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId() local PlfCoor = Plf:GetPosition() PlfCoor.y = PlfCoor.y + 25*0.74 PlfCoor.z = PlfCoor.z + 25*0.74
local b = SpawnMessageBox( "8801" ) if b == 1 then CompleteQuest("Baza_destroy_quest2") SetGameTime(9,500) PassToMap("r4m1", "FromR1M1", -1 ) trigger:Deactivate() else SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
FlyAround(1, 0, 25, 1, PlfCoor, PlfID, 1, 1 ) StartCinematic()
TActivate ("RolikENDExitToMap411") end

trigger.Name: RolikENDExitToMap411
trigger.script:
GameFiltersUse()
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: SecretDoroga_cin
trigger.script:
SetTolerance( 1100, 1002, RS_ENEMY ) CompleteQuest("Doroga_quest") FailQuest("Dubrovka_quest") TDeactivate("postBands_cin")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: OXPAHA_spawn
trigger.script:
CreateVehicleEx("r1m1_scout01","OXP1", CVector(6514.987, 230.621, 1792.381), 1025) CreateVehicleEx("r1m1_scout03","OXP2", CVector(6803.122, 210.627, 2634.800), 1025)
local vehxKar1 = GetEntityByName("OXP1") if vehxKar1 then vehxKar1:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.075, 0.082, 0.026, -0.994)) vehxKar1:SetExternalPathByName("OXPAHA1_path") vehxKar1:LimitMaxSpeed(20) end
local vehxKar2 = GetEntityByName("OXP2") if vehxKar2 then vehxKar2:SetRotation(Quaternion(-0.016, -0.833, -0.045, 0.552)) vehxKar2:SetExternalPathByName("OXPAHA2_path") vehxKar2:LimitMaxSpeed(20) end
TActivate("VishkiBOOM_cin_Length")
TActivate("OXPAHA_Return1") TActivate("OXPAHA_Return2")
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: OXPAHA_Return1
trigger.script: local vehxKar11 = GetEntityByName("OXP1") if vehxKar11 then vehxKar11:SetExternalPathByName("OXPAHA2_path") end TActivate("OXPAHA_Return11") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: OXPAHA_Return2
trigger.script: local vehxKar22 = GetEntityByName("OXP2") if vehxKar22 then vehxKar22:SetExternalPathByName("OXPAHA1_path") end TActivate("OXPAHA_Return22") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: OXPAHA_Return11
trigger.script: local vehxKar111 = GetEntityByName("OXP1") if vehxKar111 then vehxKar111:SetExternalPathByName("OXPAHA1_path") end TActivate("OXPAHA_Return1") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: OXPAHA_Return22
trigger.script: local vehxKar222 = GetEntityByName("OXP2") if vehxKar222 then vehxKar222:SetExternalPathByName("OXPAHA2_path") end TActivate("OXPAHA_Return2") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: OXPAHA_deactiv
trigger.script:
TDeactivate("VishkiBOOM_cin_Length")
local vehxKar1 = GetEntityByName("OXP1") if vehxKar1 then vehxKar1:Remove() end
local vehxKar2 = GetEntityByName("OXP2") if vehxKar2 then vehxKar2:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return1
trigger.script: local vehSecrt1 = GetEntityByName("vehSec1") if vehSecrt1 then vehSecrt1:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarier_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return11") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return11
trigger.script: local vehSecrt1 = GetEntityByName("vehSec1") if vehSecrt1 then vehSecrt1:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarierBack_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return1") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return2
trigger.script: local vehSecrt2 = GetEntityByName("vehSec2") if vehSecrt2 then vehSecrt2:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarier_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return22") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return22
trigger.script: local vehSecrt2 = GetEntityByName("vehSec2") if vehSecrt2 then vehSecrt2:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarierBack_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return2") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return3
trigger.script: local vehSecrt3 = GetEntityByName("vehSec3") if vehSecrt3 then vehSecrt3:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarier_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return33") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return33
trigger.script: local vehSecrt3 = GetEntityByName("vehSec3") if vehSecrt3 then vehSecrt3:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarierBack_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return3") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return4
trigger.script: local vehSecrt4 = GetEntityByName("vehSec4") if vehSecrt4 then vehSecrt4:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarier_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return44") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_Return44
trigger.script: local vehSecrt4 = GetEntityByName("vehSec4") if vehSecrt4 then vehSecrt4:SetExternalPathByName("OxranaCarierBack_path") end TActivate("CarierOXPAHA_Return4") trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: CarierOXPAHA_deactiv
trigger.script:
TDeactivate("CarierBOOOM_cin_Length")
local vehxKar1 = GetEntityByName("vehSec1") if vehxKar1 then vehxKar1:Remove() end
local vehxKar2 = GetEntityByName("vehSec2") if vehxKar2 then vehxKar2:Remove() end
local vehxKar3 = GetEntityByName("vehSec3") if vehxKar3 then vehxKar3:Remove() end
local vehxKar4 = GetEntityByName("vehSec4") if vehxKar4 then vehxKar4:Remove() end
trigger:Deactivate()
